remarks: Sustainable Chic Meets Village Charm: The Ultimate New Canaan duplex - Discover the perfect fusion of eco-conscious innovation and high-end sophistication in this 1,640+ sq. ft. bespoke residence at The Quartier. This sun-drenched, duplex features a private entrance with a front terrace, 7" white oak flooring, and an expansive open-concept great room anchored by a gourmet chef's kitchen with Leicht cabinetry and quartzite surfaces. While the en-suite primary retreat offers a spa-like escape, the building itself serves as a five-star sanctuary, boasting sustainable solar energy, a full-time concierge, a state-of-the-art golf simulator, entertainment lounge with catering kitchen and a professional fitness studio. Whether you're hosting at the outdoor firepit or heading to the nearby NYC train, this 2-bedroom gem puts world-class dining and boutique shopping right at your doorstep-offering a lifestyle of "white-glove" convenience in the heart of New Canaan.
